CASE STUDY

Aetheria Luxury Fine Dining

Engineering an immersive digital reservation platform for one of Bengaluru's most sought-after culinary destinations.

Industry Food & Hospitality
Technologies HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript
Client Aetheria Gastronomy Group
Completed January 2026
Visit Live Site View Source Code

The Problem

Aetheria experienced massive drops in mobile bookings due to a slow, generic reservation form hosted on a third-party platform. Visitors found it difficult to browse menu categories and verify seating availabilities on smaller screen viewports, resulting in high bounce rates and lost table monetization opportunities.

Our Solution

We engineered a premium standalone reservation application from the ground up. Features include:

  • Bespoke Booking Wizard: A step-by-step custom wizard allowing patrons to select party sizes, dates, time frames, and dining room sections.
  • Visual Card Layouts: Immersive photo-driven menus using smooth lazy-loading and skeleton screens.
  • Speed Engineering: Elimination of layout-blocking scripts, leading to a Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) of under 1.2 seconds.

The Results

+42% Mobile Bookings Increase
-35% User Checkout Bounce
100% SEO Mobile Performance

WebAura builds state-of-the-art web products optimized for speed, aesthetics, and high-impact business growth.
